overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a dimly lit gothic great hall or classroom with students in dark robes seated at wooden desks. Atmospheric fog fills the stone interior with cool natural light filtering through tall arched windows. High-quality game engine rendering reminiscent of a fantasy school setting.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic great hall or classroom with students in dark robes seated at wooden desks and benches. Tall arched windows on the left and center back walls allow cool, diffused natural light to filter through the atmospheric haze, illuminating the stone interior and marble floor. The scene remains completely still throughout the clip with no camera movement or significant action.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a gothic great hall that maintains a mood of silent, scholarly anticipation. It begins with a wide perspective of students in dark robes seated at wooden desks and benches, their forms partially veiled by a lingering haze. Cool, diffused natural light filters through tall arched windows on the left and center back walls, casting a soft glow across the stone interior. This light gradually defines the textures of the marble floor and the surrounding architecture as the scene remains perfectly still. The composition holds steady, emphasizing the stillness of the environment and the heavy, atmospheric quality of the air.
